themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Clement of Rome on Clement's First Letter to the Corinthians, Chapter 10: Abraham, styled "th...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֔רֶץ: of the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

15: for all the land which you see I will give...
